articles.title: Hudson Williams confronts autograph seekers after Paris encounter - USA Today

articles.description: Justin Baldoni is firing back at Blake Lively's request that he pay a seven-figure sum to cover her legal bills in their "It Ends With Us" battle ... TMZ has learned.

articles.title: John Mulaney Makes History in Chicago, Brings Out David Letterman, Fred Armisen and Richard Kind - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The Chicago native returned home to become the first comedian to perform at Wrigley Field, and he sold out the venue to boot, performing for one of the largest stand-up audiences ever.
